nodes.name: Google News RSS
nodes.notes: Google News search RSS for "data center" Texas. Tune the q= query to widen/narrow. No credentials needed.

nodes.name: Gemini: extract data centers
nodes.notes: Credential = Google Gemini(PaLM) Api account. Retries 3x on transient 503s.

nodes.name: Get existing facilities
nodes.notes: Credential = GitHub account. All 5 GitHub nodes use it.

nodes.name: GitHub: create branch
nodes.notes: Continue on error: existing branch (422) is fine; proceed to commit.

nodes.name: GitHub: commit file
nodes.notes: Continue on error: existing file (422 'sha wasn't supplied') is fine; proceed to open PR.

nodes.name: GitHub: open PR
nodes.notes: Continue on error: existing PR (422) shouldn't fail the run.

parameters.subject: =Review new data-center pin (news): {{ $('Build facility files').item.json.facility.name }}
=Data center needs a map location: {{ $json.facility.name }}
